prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海省理科/物理类最低位次依次为约1964→2159→2594→2328→2311名。2021至2023年位次持续后移（竞争加剧），2024年明显回升至2328名，2025年 基本持平于2311名。近两年位次稳定在2300名附近，2025年基准约2311名；该校在青海省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为38人，2025年增至39人；2026 年物理类计划34人，较2025年缩招约12.8%。缩招意味着录取名额减少，在考生规模不变的情况下竞争将有所加剧，位次数字应前移（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第35名，近年排名稳定在第33–36名区间，属于国内顶尖211高校，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（国家卫健委通报该校涉及伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文事件），对报考热度有一定抑制作用；但抖音热度总排名第1（高热），2024年抖音热 度同样排名第1，短视频平台曝光量极高，显示学校在考生群体中关注度持续火热，两者对冲后整体报考热度仍偏高。未见明显投档断档记录；冶金工程A+、材 料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科。材料科学与工程、冶金工程为全国顶尖水平，与该校理工特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有较强吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向匹配；生化环材类明显劝退，但该校材料学科为A+顶 级，可部分抵消负面舆情。青海省2026年物理类考生约30240人（按历史占比估算），与2025年30457人基本持平，考生规模变化不大；北京科技大学位于北京市，对青海考生具有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2311名、2026年缩招约12.8%（使位次前移）、抖音高热与声誉偏负面对冲、但抖音高热带来的报考关注度提升，使位次需小幅回调约50名。预测2026年理 科/物理类最低位次约2183名，区间1856–2510名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2183名，区间1856–2510名。位次在区间下限1856名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、理科试验班、工科试验班）；位次在2183名附近建议以二档为主（自动 化类、通信工程、能源动力类），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限2510名附近建议以三档保底（材料科学与工程、数学类、机械类），同时争取二档中等专业。该校材料科学与工 程虽属生化环材劝退大类，但学科评估A+全国顶尖，值得高分考生重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category in Qinghai Province were approximately 1964 → 2159 → 2594 → 2328 → 2311. Rankings continuously shifted backward from 2021 to 2023 (increased competition), significantly rebounded to 2328 in 2024, and remained roughly stable at 2311 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings stabilized around 2300, with a baseline of approximately 2311 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Qinghai: 38 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 39 in 2025; in 2026, the physics category plan is 34 students, a reduction of about 12.8% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means fewer admission slots, and with a stable candidate population, competition will intensify, causing rankings to move forward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list, with stable rankings in the 33–36 range in recent years, making it a top-tier 211 university with strong comprehensive strength. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (the National Health Commission reported the university involved in falsifying transcripts and plagiarizing theses), which has a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. However, it ranks 1st in total Douyin popularity (high heat), and also ranked 1st in Douyin popularity in 2024, with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, indicating sustained high attention among candidates. The two factors offset each other, resulting in overall application enthusiasm still being relatively high. No significant gaps in admission files have been observed. Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, totaling 4 A- or above disciplines. Materials Science and Engineering and Metallurgical Engineering are at the national top level, highly aligned with the university's engineering characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's advantageous engineering fields. Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials majors are clearly discouraged, but the university's Materials Science is A+ top-level, partially offsetting negative public opinion. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Qinghai Province is approximately 30,240 (estimated based on historical proportion), roughly unchanged from 30,457 in 2025, with little change in candidate scale. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Qinghai candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2311, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 12.8% (causing rankings to move forward), the offset between high Douyin heat and negative reputation, but the increased application attention from high Douyin heat requires a slight adjustment of about 50 positions backward. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for science/physics category is approximately 2183, with a range of 1856–2510.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2183, range 1856–2510. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 1856 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Science Experimental Class, Engineering Experimental Class); candidates around ranking 2183 are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Automation, Communication Engineering, Energy and Power), while also attempting Tier 1 sprint; candidates near the upper limit of 2510 are advised to secure Tier 3 majors (Materials Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering) as safety options, while also striving for Tier 2 moderate majors. Although Materials Science and Engineering at this university falls under the discouraged Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials categories, its A+ national top-level assessment makes it worth serious consideration for high-scoring candidates.
